title: The Dahlia Dell, Dahlia Society of California
content: The Dahlia Dell is a showcase flower garden in Golden Gate Park, San Francisco. Best time to see blooms: July, August, and September.

title: DAHLIA DELL AT GOLDEN GATE PARK - Updated June 2026 - Yelp
content: Amazing find! It's a small section of Land next to the Conservatory of Flowers! All types of Dahlias, well maintained and beautiful.
